metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Sweet Potato Leaf, certified organic by NASAA, is a fresh and naturally grown green vegetable that offers a unique and earthy flavor. Produced without synthetic chemicals or pesticides, it ensures the highest standards of sustainability and environmental responsibility. Ideal for a variety of dishes, this premium organic product guarantees quality from farm to table, supporting a healthier, eco-friendly lifestyle.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Sweet Potato Leaves, rinse thoroughly under cold water and trim the stems if needed. Stir-fry with garlic for a quick, flavorful side, or add to soups just before serving for a tender texture. Steam lightly to preserve their mild flavor, or blanch briefly before tossing in salads. Serve immediately to enjoy their fresh, delicate taste.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the vegetables at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 3 days

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Baby Spinach offers tender, mild leaves perfect for fresh salads, smoothies, and light sauteing. Certified organic by NASAA and processed in an ISO-certified facility, it guarantees high standards of quality and eco-friendliness. This versatile green blends easily into dishes, adding a fresh, earthy flavor to both raw and cooked recipes. Its delicate texture makes it an ideal choice for adding instant nutrition and color.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Baby Spinach, rinse the leaves under cold water and gently pat dry. Use whole in salads or lightly sauté for a quick side. Blend into smoothies for a natural boost, or add at the end of cooking to soups and pasta for a fresh, tender bite. Serve promptly to enjoy its delicate taste and vibrant color.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place
